summary: Bulk Reprocess feature testing completed. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified working. The AI Reprocess & Comparison page correctly displays under Settings > Before/After tab with Compare (Preview) and Full Pipeline Reprocess buttons visible and clickable.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing comparison runs in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk Reprocess feature fully tested. Key verifications: (1) GET /api/reprocess-comparison/status returns idle state, (2) GET /api/reprocess-comparison/apply-status returns idle state, (3) GET /api/reprocess-comparison/full-status returns idle state, (4) POST /api/reprocess-comparison/run starts comparison and returns run_id with status=started, (5) GET /api/reprocess-comparison/runs returns list of previous runs, (6) POST /api/reprocess-comparison/apply/{run_id} with non-existent run returns error, (7) POST /api/reprocess-comparison/run-full starts full reprocess and returns run_id with status=started, (8) Frontend Settings > Before/After tab shows AI Reprocess & Comparison page, (9) Compare (Preview) button visible and clickable - triggers toast 'Comparison started: cmp-xxx', (10) Full Pipeline Reprocess button visible and clickable.

backend_api: GET /api/reprocess-comparison/runs returns 200 with list of runs - PASS

POST /api/reprocess-comparison/run-full returns run_id and status=started - PASS
